sources.quote: Command R 03-2024 pricing is $0.50/1M tokens for input and $1.50/1M tokens for output

+ model, delivered in August 2024. Find more information here Text 128k 4k Chat command-r-03-2024 Deprecated Sept 15, 2025 Command R is an instruction-following conversational model that performs language tasks at a higher quality, more reliably, and with a longer context than previous models. It can be used for complex workflows like code generation, retrieval augmented generation (RAG), tool use, and agents. Text 128k 4k Chat
